docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AYALA, JESUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDRANO, RODOLFO $1,246.75 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,246.75 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
APPLICATION FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES & COSTS FILED /GRANTED.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,246.75 FILED BY AYALA, JESUS AS TO DEFENDANT MEDRANO, RODOLFO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-16-2007 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SUBSTITUTED PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT MEDRANO, RODOLFO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF AYALA, JESUS RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MEDRANO, RODOLFO $1,246.75 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,246.75, PAYMENTS ARE TO BE MADE AT THE RATE OF $200 PER MONTH, BEGINNING ON (DATE) FEBRUARY 01, 2007 AND ON THE 1ST DAY OF EACH MONTH THEREAFTER UNTIL PAID IN FULL. IF ANY PAYMENT IS MISSED, THE ENTIRE BALANCE DUE IMMEDIATELY. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
